name: Jane Example
title: Managing Director
source: Fake row — illustrates the save-contacts.mjs format. Not a real person.
notes: Copy this shape to stage your own research, then run `node scripts/save-contacts.mjs data/your-file.json`. companySlug (or companyWebsite) must match a row already imported into the companies table.

name: Sam Sample
title: Head of Marketing
source: Fake row — LinkedIn-only contact (no deliverable email).
notes: When no email verifies, leave email null and keep the LinkedIn URL — the app shows a "LinkedIn only" badge and the contact is excluded from sends.
